arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer target set to cost €70million
arts.sum: Real Sociedad are reportedly set to demand as much as €70million for the transfer of Arsenal target Martin Zubimendi this summer. It already looks like the Zubimendi to Arsenal deal is advanced ahead of next season, but it could still be that there are some details to work out. arts.ttl: Arsenal defender Ayden Heaven set to turn down contract offer and join Manchester United
arts.sum: Heaven made his senior debut for Arsenal in the Carabao Cup earlier this season

arts.ttl: £105m cut-off no issue for Liverpool and Arsenal as FSG and KSE set budgets ahead of deadline day
Report: Arsenal pleasantly surprised by star’s availability as top talent keen on transfer
arts.sum: Arsenal are reportedly surprised that a player of the calibre of Mathys Tel has become available in this January’s transfer window. The highly-rated 19-year-old has struggled for regular playing time at Bayern Munich and this has inevitably led to speculation over his future in the last few days. arts.ttl: Myles Lewis-Skelly still the real villain in Arsenal controversy despite FA U-turn
arts.sum: The FA's independent commission decided that the referee had been wrong to send off Arsenal's midfielder for cynically fouling Matt Doherty in the game at Wolves last Saturday

arts.ttl: Arsenal's Invincibles are close to agreeing deal over documentary charting incredible unbeaten season
arts.sum: MIKE KEEGAN: Mail Sport understands that, after a long period of negotiation, a breakthrough has taken place with an announcement on the project due in the near future.

arts.ttl: Inter Milan looking to sign Arsenal player on the cheap – Plan in the works
arts.sum: Oleksandr Zinchenko has been a bit-part player for Arsenal this season. The Ukrainian has made 13 appearances in all competitions, playing a little over 400 minutes. He has remained on the bench in the club’s last two games. As his game time continues to reduce at Arsenal, Zinchenko’s future is therefore under some question. arts.ttl: ‘I’m hearing’: Arsenal are ‘close’ to making £12m signing now – journalist
arts.sum: Arsenal are yet to make a signing in the January transfer window. Indeed, the Gunners haven’t been active at all this month, despite being linked...

arts.ttl: Arsenal eye Chelsea target Mathys Tel but face one stumbling block for Bayern star
arts.sum: The French teenager is keen to secure regular football, which could suit the Gunners and help them to beat rivals Chelsea in the race

arts.ttl: Every word Mikel Arteta said on Girona, Myles Lewis-Skelly, Michael Oliver and transfers
arts.sum: Obviously very happy that the decision has been made and that Myles is going to be able to play for us again in the next few games. Well, it does affect, yes, because obviously, we've had a lot of uncertainty, not only for Sunday, but for tomorrow and for the next few games as well, so now we have more options, he's going to be available and it's something very positive for the team.
